text: The best SaaS products I have used were built by people who had the problem themselves. If you are building for a market you do not understand, you are guessing in production. #SaaS #buildinpublic
Six weeks in. The signup number is fine. The DM quality is the actual leading indicator. Five this would replace what I pay for beats fifty looks cool, will check it out. #buildinpublic #SaaS

Looked at review velocity vs map pack position across 150 businesses. Ten recent reviews consistently outperformed two hundred old ones. Freshness beats volume more than freshness beats quality. #LocalSEO #SEO

Spent real money on a cold email tool to recruit beta users. Got nothing. Posted one honest tweet about what I was building. Got twelve DMs. The internet rewards specificity, not scale. #buildinpublic #SaaS
